## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and why? Link any related issue: "Closes #123". -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Data correction (application / link / description)
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `cd frontend && npm run lint && npm run build` passes
- [ ] Changes are focused and match the surrounding code style
- [ ] For data changes: cited a source (Palantir docs link) where possible
- [ ] For UI changes: included a screenshot below
